data.name: ResourceNotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: OperationFailed
data.value: The operation could not be completed.

data.name: RoomNotFound
data.value: The selected room was not found.

data.name: RoomInMaintenance
data.value: The selected room is in maintenance.

data.name: InvalidGuestsQuantity
data.value: The guests quantity exceeds the room capacity of {0}.

data.name: ReservationOverlap
data.value: The reservation overlaps with another reservation or active stay.

data.name: InvalidDateRange
data.value: The start date must be earlier than the end date.

data.name: InvalidDurationHours
data.value: The reservation duration must be a whole number of hours. The start time can be any minute.
